zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Driby於1340年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾衛克菲德 聖 約翰時，她的父親John de Driby30歲，母親Amie Gaveston28歲。她於1368年之前與Anketin Malore Sir結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年10月12日在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福享年72歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Driby于1340年出生在英国英格兰越可爾衛克菲德 聖 約翰时，她的父亲John de Driby30岁，母亲Amie Gaveston28岁。她于1368年之前与Anketin Malore Sir结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年10月12日在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福享年72岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Driby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Riby (Lincs) or perhaps Ribby (Lancs); on the latter name,  see also  Rigby  . See also   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  .

variants.name: Rigby
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames
meanings: 1 Irish: from Ó Ráighne, Mac Ráighne, from a personal name derived from the Scandinavian name Rǫgnvaldr. Compare English Randall , Reynold .
2  Norman, English: locative name from Regny (Loire).
3 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Rayn(e)y, Renie, a pet form of Reynold .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Driby was born in 1340, in Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Driby, was 30 and her mother, Amie Gaveston, was 28. She married Anketin Malore Sir before 1368. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 12 October 1412, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, England: Wakefield St John, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Driby est née en 1340, à Wakefield St John, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Driby, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Amie Gaveston, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Anketin Malore Sir avant 1368. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1412, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Driby 1340 in Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Driby 30 und ihre Mutter Amie Gaveston 28. Sie hat vor 1368 Anketin Malore Sir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1412 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Driby è nata il nel 1340 nel Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Driby, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Amie Gaveston, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Anketin Malore Sir prima del 1368. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1412, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Stamford, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Dribyが1340年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールド スト ジョンで生まれた時，父John de Dribyは30歳，母Amie Gavestonは28歳であった。1368年以前にAnketin Malore Sirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年10月12日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで72歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Driby(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨이크필드 스트 존에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Driby(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amie Gaveston(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1368년 이전 Anketin Malore Sir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 10월 12일 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Driby nasceu em 1340, em Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Driby, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Amie Gaveston, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Anketin Malore Sir antes 1368. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1412, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, England: веикефиелд ст джон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Driby родилась в 1340 г. в местности веикефиелд ст джон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Driby было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Amie Gaveston, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anketin Malore Sir перед 1368 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 12 октября 1412 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Driby nació en 1340, en Wakefield St John, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Driby, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Amie Gaveston, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Anketin Malore Sir antes de 1368. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1412, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
